name: brand_analytics_list_tracked_search_terms
description:
Lists the company's tracked search terms (keyword cores) from brand_analytics_iceberg.tracked_search_terms.

Use this tool to:
- See which keywords the company is tracking for a given ASIN, parent, or product family
- Audit priority and intent assignments before running diagnostics
- Retrieve the keyword list that brand_analytics_growth_machine_diagnosis auto-scopes to when use_tracked_search_terms=true

Scope: one row per (company_id, marketplace, keyword, asin, parent_asin, product_family). Null scope means the keyword applies company-wide.

marketplaces.description: Optional: filter by Amazon marketplace code(s).

asin.description: Optional: filter to keywords scoped to these child ASINs.

parent_asin.description: Optional: filter to keywords scoped to these parent ASINs.

product_family.description: Optional: filter to keywords scoped to these product families.

keywords.description: Optional: filter to specific keywords (exact match).

include_inactive.description: If true, include soft-deleted rows (is_active = false).
